heroHeadline: Netanyahu: Ceasefire Excludes Lebanon; World Urges Lasting Peace as US Congress Splits on Durability
heroSubtitle: Netanyahu clarifies the US-Iran ceasefire does not extend to Lebanon, preserving Israeli freedom of action against Hezbollah. World leaders broadly welcome the pause and urge diplomacy; US politicians divided on durability and next steps.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
